---
name: Task suggestion
about: Suggest a new evaluation task or design scene
title: "[Task] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Scene**
Which of the 7 scenes does this task belong to? (or propose a new scene)

**Task type**
- [ ] Ambiguous (模糊)
- [ ] Explicit (明确)
- [ ] Edit-type (编辑型) — requires reference image
- [ ] Compound (复合型)

**Prompt**
Paste the exact prompt text (English + Chinese if bilingual):

**Why this task?**
What capability gap does it expose?

**Have you tested it on any product?**
Optional — paste any screenshots or results.
